title: Goomba’s
description: It’s those crazy calamaris, the Goombas! The Goomba boys and girls eat pizzas and calzones and they are having lots of fun.
altHero: three green Italian dudes, the Goomba boys
alt1: the boys checking out two Goomba gals
alt3: the Goomba boys being scolded by two nuns
alt4: lots of Goombas in the streets of Goombaland
